Waveform.protectedStreamDesc: Protected stream from Supabase Storage. Story length {duration}. {expires}

Login.title: Family Heritage Archive
Login.subtitle: A sanctuary for family memories, preserved forever.
Login.description: Listen to new life stories, respond with warmth, and manage family access to keep every shared memory in one protected home.
Login.protectedPlaybackDesc: Every recording is private, encrypted, and accessible only to your circle.
Login.familyControlsDesc: Invite siblings, manage devices, and interact through a unified heritage portal.

Dashboard.systemStateConfigured: Connection active. Your family archive is synced and secure.
Dashboard.systemStatePreview: Welcome to the preview. Sign in to see your family's real stories.
Dashboard.currentFocusDesc: A dedicated space to listen to your elders, manage recording devices, and stay connected to your family's history.

Overview.title: Welcome to your family's listening room.
Overview.description: Listen, respond, and cherish. This platform is designed to bring generations closer through the power of voice.

Stories.emptySearchDesc: Try adjusting your search terms or checking your current filters.
Stories.description: Manage and interact with all family audio archives
Stories.emptyArchiveDesc: No archived stories are waiting here. This is a temporary sanctuary for archived memories.
Stories.deleteConfirmDesc: This memory will be completely purged from the heritage center. This action cannot be undone.
Stories.transcriptNote: Transcript will sync with AI's narration. Correction available via the edit icon.
Stories.batchDeleteQuote: "Some stories, once gone, echo no more."
Stories.archiveConfirmDesc: This story will be removed from the main gallery and heart-felt collections. It will be kept in the <drawer>Archive Drawer</drawer> for 30 days before it naturally fades away.
Stories.playbackProcessingNote: Playback is currently being processed. Check back in a few moments or ensure the storyteller device is online.
Stories.noCommentsYet: Your family hasn't commented on this memory yet.
Stories.searchAdjust: Try adjusting your search terms or filters to find what you're looking for.

Family.title: Family Members
Family.subtitle: Manage family circle and permissions
Family.removeConfirmDesc: You are about to make a serious decision: removing {name} from the heritage vault. They will lose access to all memories and interactive sections.
Family.inviteHelpText: Invites create or refresh the pending family link.

Interactions.pageDescription: Here you can view comments and emotional feedback from family members, and more importantly, initiate questions to elders to guide them into new memories.
Interactions.formSubtitle: A thoughtful prompt can spark a lifetime of memories
Interactions.placeholder: e.g., Can you tell me more about your favorite summer memory from childhood?
Interactions.micAccessRequired: Please allow microphone access to record voice replies.
Interactions.noStorytellerDesc: Connect to a senior to start asking questions.
Interactions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently withdraw this message from the archive?
Interactions.metricsCommentsDesc: Recent comments visible to the current family session.
Interactions.metricsReactionsDesc: Lightweight emotional signals attached to shared stories.
Interactions.metricsStoriesTouchedDesc: Distinct archive items with fresh family activity.
Interactions.emptyState: No recent interaction is visible to this family session yet.

Devices.title: Recording Console
Devices.subtitle: Manage family recorder hardware and authorized capture devices
Devices.pairDesc: Link this archive to the senior's mobile device
Devices.pairingCodeDesc: Found in the Elder's mobile app
Devices.revokeConfirmDesc: This will stop the device from uploading new stories to the archive.
Devices.pairingFooter: By connecting, you will be able to listen to stories, send questions, and manage the storytelling archive.
Devices.emptyDesc: Pair new hardware storyboxes or authorized capture devices to begin recording.
Devices.pairingNote: * Use the unique 8-character pairing code displayed on the storybox screen or mobile app to establish a secure, encrypted link.
Devices.audioStreamDesc: All connected devices use the Heritage Audio Stream protocol with zero-retention edge processing.

Settings.title: Archive Governance
Settings.subtitle: Configure family vault identity, security policies, and data portability
Settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Enable real-time alerts for new recordings
Settings.aiGuidanceDesc: Allow AI to suggest story topics to elders
Settings.exportSubtitle: Exercise full sovereignty over your family memories
Settings.exportBody: We believe that family history should never be locked behind a single platform. Generate a structured snapshot of all family data.
Settings.retentionDesc: Deleted stories are moved to Trash for 30 days before permanent expungement.
Settings.encryptionDesc: AES-256 encryption applied at the source node.
Settings.formatNote: Format: JSON Bundle (Images/Audio exported via secure signed links)

Audit.title: Audit Awareness
Audit.subtitle: Real-time system integrity and activity footprint

Naming.helperText: This is the official name of your family memories

Audit.title: Family Footprint Timeline
Audit.description: Every echo of intent within the archive is recorded here. Whether a senior records a new story or a family member leaves a heart, every interaction is a precious stroke in the canvas of family history.

metrics.unreadDesc: Latest signals from family not yet heard by the elder.
metrics.invitesDesc: Pending invitations for new members to join the circle.
metrics.recentDesc: Family archive interactions in the last 72 hours.
metrics.securityDesc: Revoked or expired offline recording device logs.

Audit.emptyNote: No public family activity yet. Every interaction is a crossroad of history.

Archive.title: The Dusty Drawer
Archive.description: These memories have been temporarily moved away from the main gallery. They are resting here and will naturally vanish in 30 days if left undisturbed. You can awaken them anytime.
Archive.securityDesc: Permanently vanishing a memory means it will be physically removed from our servers and encrypted storage. Family members will no longer be able to listen to or comment on that specific moment. Please proceed with historical caution.
